description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent gable roof and an extended lower roof covering a wide porch area. The exterior is primarily constructed from wood, with visible timber beams and detailed wooden paneling. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, with small square panes and decorative framing. A brick chimney with visible smoke rises from the rear section, adding a rustic touch. The house sits on a green base, suggesting a lawn or yard, and the front entryway is accentuated by a covered porch supported by wooden columns. The overall design evokes a traditional, craftsman-inspired architectural style with a warm, inviting appearance.
description: A two-story wooden house with a gable roof, wide porch, symmetrical windows, and a brick chimney, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered gable roofs and the full length of the porch, with minimal window detail visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and the covered porch supported by columns.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the brick chimney with smoke, the back gable, and additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the upper story gable, symmetrical windows, and the extended lower roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden columns, central door, and decorative overhang
